targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -180d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched" and r._field == "temperature_c") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> last()

from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -180d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched" and r._field == "apparent_temperature_c") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> last()

panels.description: Accumulated precipitation across the last 24 hours.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -180d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched" and r._field == "precipitation_mm") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 24h, fn: sum, createEmpty: false) |> last()

panels.title: Rain (Last 24h)

panels.description: Highest recorded wind speed across the last 24 hours.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -180d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched" and r._field == "wind_speed_kmh") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 24h, fn: max, createEmpty: false) |> last()

panels.title: Max Wind (24h)

panels.description: Hourly average trend of observed and apparent temperature.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched" and r._field == "temperature_c") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched" and r._field == "apparent_temperature_c") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Temperature vs Feels Like

panels.description: Humidity and cloud cover profile by hour.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched" and r._field == "humidity_pct") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched" and r._field == "cloud_cover_pct") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Humidity vs Cloud Cover

panels.description: Precipitation by hour for the selected window.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched" and r._field == "precipitation_mm") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Hourly Precipitation

panels.description: Comfort index trend from enriched weather logic.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched" and r._field == "comfort_index") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Comfort Index

panels.description: Latest detailed observations in tabular form.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -180d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.city == "${city}") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature_c" or r._field == "apparent_temperature_c" or r._field == "humidity_pct" or r._field == "cloud_cover_pct" or r._field == "precipitation_mm" or r._field == "wind_speed_kmh" or r._field == "comfort_index") |> pivot(rowKey:["_time","city"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value") |> keep(columns: ["_time","city","temperature_c","apparent_temperature_c","humidity_pct","cloud_cover_pct","precipitation_mm","wind_speed_kmh","comfort_index"]) |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 72)

panels.title: Hourly Observation Table (72h)

panels.description: Sum of all trips across the synced taxi dataset.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -5y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "taxi_daily" and r._field == "trip_count") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Total Trips (Dataset)

panels.description: Total taxi revenue in USD across the synced dataset.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -5y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "taxi_daily" and r._field == "revenue_usd") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Total Revenue USD (Dataset)

panels.description: Latest available USD to EUR exchange rate.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -5y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "economy_daily" and r._field == "usd_to_eur_rate") |> last()

panels.title: Latest USD/EUR FX

panels.description: Latest available GDP value from World Bank feed.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -5y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "economy_daily" and r._field == "gdp_usd") |> last()

panels.title: Latest GDP USD

panels.description: Daily total trips and revenue from NYC taxi dataset.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -5y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "taxi_daily" and r._field == "trip_count") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -5y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "taxi_daily" and r._field == "revenue_usd") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Daily Trips vs Revenue (Taxi)

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -5y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "economy_daily" and r._field == "usd_to_eur_rate") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.description: Daily PM2.5 average concentration from OpenAQ.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -10y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality_daily" and r._field == "avg_pollutant_value") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.parameter == "pm25") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: PM2.5 Daily Average (OpenAQ)

panels.description: GDP trend from World Bank (repeated across available FX dates for analysis).

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -10y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "economy_daily" and r._field == "gdp_usd") |> aggregateWindow(every: 30d, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: GDP USD Trend

panels.description: Daily taxi revenue converted to EUR using USD/EUR FX rate.

targets.query:
taxi = from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -5y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "taxi_daily" and r._field == "revenue_usd") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "revenue_usd"})
fx = from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -5y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "economy_daily" and r._field == "usd_to_eur_rate") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: last, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "usd_to_eur_rate"})
join(tables: {taxi: taxi, fx: fx}, on: ["_time"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r.revenue_usd) * float(v: r.usd_to_eur_rate), _field: "revenue_eur" })) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: Revenue in EUR (Derived from FX)

panels.description: Unified view panel to compare mobility volume and PM2.5 pollution pattern.

targets.query: from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -10y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "taxi_daily" and r._field == "trip_count") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "weather_timeseries") |> range(start: -10y) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality_daily" and r._field == "avg_pollutant_value") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.parameter == "pm25") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Trips vs PM2.5 (Unified View)

list.definition: import "influxdata/influxdb/schema" schema.tagValues(bucket: "weather_timeseries", tag: "city", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched", start: -365d)
list.label: City
list.name: city
list.query: import "influxdata/influxdb/schema" schema.tagValues(bucket: "weather_timeseries", tag: "city", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "weather_enriched", start: -365d)

title: Fabric Unified Mobility, Air Quality & Economy
